concerns.text: Task T015 implements filtering features with |r| > 0.85. This directly contradicts FR-001 (in spec.md) which explicitly forbids excluding features based on target correlation to prevent tautological validation. The task implements a logic that the spec explicitly rejects, leaving the requirement un-satisfiable as written.

FR-007 requires an iterative VIF removal process ('iteratively removing the feature with the highest VIF if VIF > 5.0'). Task T031 only implements VIF calculation and clustering for diagnostics. There is no task covering the required feature removal logic, leaving FR-007 unimplemented.

The plan and spec (FR-006, SC-005) mandate a dedicated automated unit test asserting no 3D functions are called. Task T028 is a subjective verification step ('Verify no data leakage'). While T011 exists for 3D exclusion, T028's lack of a specific test artifact means the explicit requirement for an automated assertion in the training context is not fully covered by a distinct task.

Task T009 requests '.env or YAML config', but the plan and Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) imply hardcoded or single-file configuration to ensure seed pinning. This task description is ambiguous and risks implementing a configuration method that violates the reproducibility constraint.
